name: @siiway/prism
description: TypeScript SDK for integrating Prism OAuth 2.0 / OpenID Connect identity platform

scripts.build: bun run build:types && bun run build:esm && bun run build:cjs
scripts.build:esm: bun build src/index.ts --outdir dist --format esm --target browser --sourcemap=external
scripts.build:cjs: bun build src/index.ts --outdir dist/cjs --format cjs --target node && mv dist/cjs/index.js dist/index.cjs && rm -rf dist/cjs && cp dist/index.d.ts dist/index.d.cts
